hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -v 'CLAUDE\.md' | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|sql|json|css)$' && touch /tmp/cagepredict-src-changed.flag 2>/dev/null || true

[ -f /tmp/cagepredict-src-changed.flag ] && rm -f /tmp/cagepredict-src-changed.flag && printf '{"systemMessage":"📝 Source files changed this session — update CLAUDE.md if any architecture, env vars, Supabase patterns, server actions, or DB schema changed."}' || true
